focus: Confidence-value internal consistency audit for edge metadata consumers

findingsNew.title: AMBIGUOUS evidence no longer sets why_included.ambiguous
findingsNew.claim: The trace consumer still derives why_included[].ambiguous with formattedEdge.evidenceClass === 'INFERRED', so newly differentiated CALLS edges marked AMBIGUOUS are emitted with an AMBIGUOUS edge-chain step but the containing file-level trace entry is not marked ambiguous.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked contextEdgeReliability and confirmed AMBIGUOUS is intentionally ranked lower than INFERRED, so ranking is not the broken consumer. Checked query-result-adapter and found pass-through behavior only, with no ambiguity reinterpretation.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The field could have been intended to mean only inferred, not ambiguous. The nearby comment and field name contradict that narrower reading, and the new producer emits an explicit AMBIGUOUS class.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if the public contract is clarified so why_included.ambiguous deliberately means only INFERRED, or if includeTrace consumers rely solely on edgeChain[].evidenceClass.

findingDetails.title: AMBIGUOUS evidence no longer sets why_included.ambiguous
findingDetails.scopeProof: Scoped grep across mcp_server/lib for EdgeEvidenceClass|evidenceClass|contextEdgeReliability|\.confidence\b|confidence: found the rank-blend consumer, the trace consumer, the adapter pass-through, and producer sites; no other in-scope consumer reinterprets AMBIGUOUS as non-ambiguous.

traceabilityChecks.edgeEvidenceTypeCoverage: pass: CodeEdgeMetadata evidenceClass is exactly EXTRACTED|INFERRED|AMBIGUOUS in indexer-types.ts
traceabilityChecks.sharedPayloadVocabulary: not_applicable: shared-payload GraphEdgeEnrichment uses a separate edgeEvidenceClass vocabulary and is not the CodeEdgeMetadata path
traceabilityChecks.contextEdgeReliabilityRange: pass: clampConfidence accepts 0..1 and the four values are in range
traceabilityChecks.contextEdgeReliabilityDistribution: pass_with_caveat: rank factors already distinguish EXTRACTED, INFERRED, and AMBIGUOUS with no >=0.5 assumption
traceabilityChecks.otherConsumers: conditional: query adapter passes through safely; why_included trace ambiguity mishandles AMBIGUOUS

summary: Scoped search across mcp_server/lib found contextEdgeReliability, query-result-adapter pass-through, format/trace output, and producer write sites for confidence/evidenceClass.
why_included.ambiguous only checks INFERRED and misses newly explicit AMBIGUOUS edges.
